title: Israel's 'Yellow Line' in Lebanon: 10km military zone, 55 villages off-limits
snippet: Israel established a 10km 'Yellow Line' military zone in southern Lebanon, declaring 55 villages off-limits. Described as 'Gaza model replicated in Lebanon.' IDF razing villages during ceasefire, blowing up homes in Haneen.
tag_reason: First detailed report on Israel's 'Yellow Line' concept — 10km zone, 55 villages, systematic demolition during ceasefire
